```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const x1Min = -10, x1Max = 10;
  const x2Min = -10, x2Max = 10;
  const step = 0.25;

  const x1s = d3.range(x1Min, x1Max + step, step);
  const x2s = d3.range(x2Min, x2Max + step, step);

  const boxWidth = (x1Max - x1Min) * 0.5;
  const boxHeight = (x2Max - x2Min) * 0.25;

  const m = -w1 / w2;
  const ord = -b_2d / w2;
  const boundaryData = x1s.map(xi => ({ x1: xi, x2: m * xi + ord }));

  const invalid = w1 === 0 && w2 === 0;

  let boundaryPlot;

  if (invalid) {
    boundaryPlot = null;
  } else if (w1 === 0) {
    boundaryPlot = Plot.ruleY([-b_2d / w2], { stroke: "black", strokeWidth: 3 });
  } else if (w2 === 0) {
    boundaryPlot = Plot.ruleX([-b_2d / w1], { stroke: "black", strokeWidth: 3 });
  } else {
    boundaryPlot = Plot.line(boundaryData, {
      x: "x1",
      y: "x2",
      stroke: "black",
      strokeWidth: 3
    });
  }

  const gridData = x1s.flatMap(x1 =>
    x2s.map(x2 => ({
      x1,
      x2,
      pred: activation(w1 * x1 + w2 * x2 + b_2d) >= 0.5 ? 1 : 0
    }))
  );

  const plot = Plot.plot({
    width: 640,
    height: 420,
    x: {label: "x1", domain: [x1Min, x1Max]},
    y: {label: "x2", domain: [x2Min, x2Max]},
    color: {
      domain: [0, 1],
      range: ["#9ecae1", "#bae4b3"],
      legend: true,
      legendOrientation: "right",
      label: "σ(wx + b)"
    },
    marks: [
      Plot.raster({
        x1: x1Min,
        x2: x1Max,
        y1: x2Min,
        y2: x2Max,
        pixelSize: 4,
        fill: (x1, x2) => activation(w1 * x1 + w2 * x2 + b_2d)
      }),
      Plot.ruleX([0], { stroke: "black", strokeDasharray: "4,4" }),
      Plot.ruleY([0], { stroke: "black", strokeDasharray: "4,4" }),
      boundaryPlot,
      invalid && Plot.rect(
        [{
          x1: -boxWidth / 2,
          x2: boxWidth / 2,
          y1: -boxHeight / 2,
          y2: boxHeight / 2
        }],
        {
          x1: "x1",
          x2: "x2",
          y1: "y1",
          y2: "y2",
          fill: "white",
          fillOpacity: 0.9,
          stroke: "black",
          strokeWidth: 1
        }
      ),
      invalid && Plot.text(
        [{
          x1: 0,
          x2: 0,
          label: "No decision boundary :)\nThis is because w1 = w2 = 0\n\nTherefore, we choose based on b\nIf b >= 0, choose 1, otherwise 0."
        }],
        {
          x: "x1",
          y: "x2",
          text: "label",
          textAnchor: "middle",
          fontSize: 14,
          fill: "black"
        }
      )
    ].filter(Boolean)
  });

  const title = document.createElement("div");
  title.textContent = `Decision boundary`;
  title.style.cssText = "text-align: center; font-size: 0.9em; margin-bottom: 2px;";

  const div = document.createElement("div");
  div.style.cssText = "display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;";
  div.appendChild(title);
  div.appendChild(plot);
  return div;
}
```
